title: ASR Outdoor Folding Pocket Knife 16 in 1 Adventure Tool, 4 Inch - Black
description:
This 16-in-1 tool is perfect for outdoor adventures. Whether you’re camping, hunting, or hiking, this pocket knife has you covered! Made of stainless steel, this multi-functional tool is durable and reliable. This tool is 3.5 inches in length and can easily be tucked away in your pocket or bag. The knife blade, fish scaler, hook dislodger, and rope saw can be used while hunting and fishing. Utilize the corkscrew, bottle opener, and can opener for food and beverage consumption. If you’re in need of hygiene-focused instruments, the toothpick, tweezers, nail cleaner, and file will come in handy. For repairs and general outdoor gear maintenance, this pocket tool has a Phillips bit, reamer, tent reamer, slotted bit, and scissors for your use

ASR Outdoor Folding Pocket Knife 16 in 1 Adventure Tool, 4 Inch - Black

This 16-in-1 tool is perfect for outdoor adventures. Whether you’re camping, hunting, or hiking, this pocket knife has you covered!

Made of stainless steel, this multi-functional tool is durable and reliable. This tool is 3.5 inches in length and can easily be tucked away in your pocket or bag.

Key Features

  • 16 IN 1 MULTI FUNCTION - Tools for every situation | Toothpick, tweezers, Phillips bit, reamer, corkscrew, nail cleaner, file, tent reamer, slotted bit, bottle opener, scissors, can opener, fish scaler, fish hook dislodger, rope saw, & knife blade
  • POCKET SIZED - 3.5” L x 1” W | Easy to pack for outdoor adventures
  • STAINLESS STEEL - Durable material | Quality tools in times of need
  • KEY RING - Can be attached to keys or lanyard | Convenient for travel and access
  • VERSATILE TOOL - Easy to switch between use of tools

Product Specifications

  • MPN: MFPT11
  • UPC: 060886456575
  • Color: Black
  • Size: 4 in

The knife blade, fish scaler, hook dislodger, and rope saw can be used while hunting and fishing. Utilize the corkscrew, bottle opener, and can opener for food and beverage consumption.

If you’re in need of hygiene-focused instruments, the toothpick, tweezers, nail cleaner, and file will come in handy. For repairs and general outdoor gear maintenance, this pocket tool has a Phillips bit, reamer, tent reamer, slotted bit, and scissors for your use.

Featuring a key ring, attach this tool to your keys or lanyard for carrying convenience and easy access. Created to be versatile, you'll enjoy the many uses of these tools!
